event_comments:
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Please note that the road-crossing legs are included in WinSplits, Attackpoint, Livelox, and RouteGadget because those apps react poorly to voided legs. The results listed below exclude the legs 118-132, 132-118, 143-142, and 133-134.
